problem id: 8edddcc4
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(7) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  10011011 -> 10000100
  01010001 -> 10000010
  01011001 -> 10000010
  10010001 -> 10000100
  01110010 -> 00000011
  00001100 -> 00000000
  11101011 -> 10000111
  01001000 -> 00000010

query: 01100100
predicted answer: 00000011
